trigger_keywords: qué puede provocar aromas a humedad o cartón mojado en un vino
aroma a moho o sótano húmedo

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Wine is contaminated by TCA, often through affected cork or winery materials.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: TCA is perceptible at very low concentrations and suppresses fruit aromas while adding musty odours.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The wine smells muted, mouldy, or like damp cellar and wet cardboard.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The wine smells muted, mouldy, or like damp cellar and wet cardboard.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
